prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to an application made to the Environment Agency, which operates in England. It relates specifically to water abstraction regulations under English law, and does not apply to Scotland, where water management is governed by separate legislation and agencies.
